summary: Comprehensive testing of CRM application completed. Fixed Google auth redirect loop, PWA support verified, data storage info confirmed. Backend APIs working well (36/37 tests passed), frontend fully functional with proper auth flow.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 520 server error instead of 400 when no data provided
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - error handling could be improved

passed_tests: Login page loads without redirect loop
Google login button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com correctly
Auth callback page handles session_id processing
Login page shows 'Verileriniz güvende' info box
PWA manifest.json exists and is valid
Service worker file exists with correct functionality
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
Backend CRUD operations for customers and visits
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Fix auth/session endpoint to return proper 400 status code instead of 520 when no data is provided. This is a low priority issue as the main functionality works correctly.
